overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a character walking through a cozy, warmly lit wizarding dormitory with arched stone corridors and wooden beams, approaching a bed to initiate a sleep interaction.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular entrance hall with stained glass windows

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the circular rug toward the left arched doorway with stained glass

entered.detail: round room with two large arched stained glass windows and warm wall sconces
large circular stained glass window serving as the exit doorway with intricate patterns
decorative stained glass window with colorful patterns
warm glowing lanterns mounted on the stone walls between the windows
ornate circular rug covering the wooden floor in the center of the hall

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a circular entrance hall with warm lighting from wall sconces between two large stained glass windows. The camera follows from behind as the character walks across an ornate circular rug toward the left arched doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone corridor with barrel vault ceiling

events.description: character walks through the stained glass archway from the entrance hall into a narrow stone corridor

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrow corridor with barrel vault ceiling and stone walls

entered.detail: arched stone ceiling with wooden beams creating a tunnel-like corridor
rough stone brick walls with carved decorative patterns
warm glowing lanterns mounted along the corridor walls
simple wooden bench against the corridor wall
pile of wooden crates and storage boxes

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow stone corridor with a barrel vault ceiling and warm wall lanterns. The corridor features wooden benches and stacked crates along the sides as the character walks toward the bedroom archway at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: cozy bedroom with wooden furniture and arched ceilings

events.description: character exits the corridor and enters the bedroom through an arched stone doorway

agents.ego_description: entering the bedroom and walking toward the wooden four-poster bed in the center of the room

entered.detail: large wooden bed with posts and green patterned bedding
wooden desk with chair and papers against the left wall
tall standing lamp with warm light next to the desk
tall wooden cabinet with doors for clothing storage
circular mirror with decorative frame hanging above the desk

segments.scene_description: The character enters a cozy bedroom with wooden floorboards and warm lighting from multiple lamps. The room contains a four-poster bed with green bedding, a writing desk with a round mirror above it, and wooden wardrobes. The character walks toward the bed as the camera follows.

scene_state.functional_zone: bedroom interior with sleep interaction point

events.description: sleep interaction prompt appears as character reaches the bedside

agents.ego_description: standing still at the bedside facing the room interior

segments.scene_description: The camera comes to a stop near the bed, showing a static view of the cozy bedroom interior. The writing desk with its lamp and mirror is visible to the left, while the wooden bed with green bedding occupies the right side of the frame. A sleep interaction prompt appears, indicating the character can rest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a grand, illuminated entrance hall into the intimate confines of a cozy wizarding bedroom. It begins behind the character in a circular hall, moving across an ornate rug and past stained glass windows toward a left-hand arched doorway. As the character passes through the arch, the scene shifts into a narrow stone corridor with a barrel vault ceiling, gliding past wooden benches and crates under the glow of wall lanterns. The camera then follows the character through a final archway into a warm bedroom filled with wooden floorboards, wardrobes, and a writing desk. Finally, the movement comes to a stop beside a four-poster bed with green bedding, where a sleep interaction prompt appears against the backdrop of the lamp-lit room.
